title: HIV SERVICES - 211info
text: ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON HIV DAY CENTER HIV SERVICES Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a drop-in center serving hot breakfast and lunches, access to phones and computers, and recreational activities such as art therapy, games, and video-based media. Also provides clothing, showers, mail services, and hygiene supplies. Guests have access to laundry services, massages, acupuncture, foot care, and haircuts on a sign-up basis. 2941 NE Ainsworth Street Basement Portland, OR 97211 Eligibility: Individuals who are HIV-positive and have incomes no greater than 300% of the federal poverty level Hours: Breakfast: Monday-Friday 9am-10:30am Lunch: Monday-Friday 1pm All other services: Monday-Friday 9am-4pm Email (503) 460-3822 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 460-3822 FAX (503) 460-3933 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in or call for more information FEES: None DOCUMENTS: Proof of income LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Clackamas, Columbia, Multnomah, Washington, and Yamhill Counties Services: Alternative Medicine * AIDS/HIV Issues Arts and Crafts Instruction * AIDS/HIV Issues Community Meals * AIDS/HIV Issues Drop In Centers * AIDS/HIV Issues General Clothing Provision * AIDS/HIV Issues General Recreational Activities/Sports * AIDS/HIV Issues Hair and Nail Care * AIDS/HIV Issues Laundry Facilities * AIDS/HIV Issues Personal/Grooming Supplies * AIDS/HIV Issues Podiatry/Foot Care * AIDS/HIV Issues Public Internet Access Sites * AIDS/HIV Issues Public Showers/Baths * AIDS/HIV Issues Telephone Facilities * AIDS/HIV Issues Temporary Mailing Address * AIDS/HIV Issues If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. ECUMENICAL MINISTRIES OF OREGON HIV DAY CENTER
